creator: sbz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Mark,

Correct, I have restored the previous version 20.0.1 in 0e63dc8634485b1b16e1b11e56580b482cc5c3bd [1]. Indeed in order to be able to update security/py-openssl to 22.0.0 we need to wait for the update of security/py-cryptography to be at least at version 35.0.0 to avoid consumers issues. Thanks!

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=0e63dc8634485b1b16e1b11e56580b482cc5c3bd
